title: Mace+
description: A texture pack that turns the mace into a cool looking eye.
body:
# Mace+
Mace+ is a resource pack that replaces the vanilla mace texture with a brighter, more stylized design inspired by Terraria-style weapons.
## Features
- Replaces the vanilla mace texture
- Eye-on-a-stick design with brighter colors
- More visually interesting than the default metallic look
- Purely visual change with no gameplay impact
## **Why use this pack?**
The vanilla mace has a very plain, gray metallic appearance. Mace+ gives it a more vibrant and unique look, making the weapon more fun and interesting to use if you want something different from the default style.
